app.name: Balance
app.description: A calm, lightweight, mobile-responsive household finance app.
app.shellHeroTitle: Structured finances create peace of mind.
app.shellHeaderDescription: Review your finances, tidy up records, and keep a calm money rhythm every day.
app.navigationTitle: Browse wallet areas and main pages
app.navigationDescription: Use this drawer to jump to more detailed wallet destinations without disturbing the main bottom navigation.

common.inlineEditDescription: Open this panel to update data without leaving the page.

ai.rateLimited: AI requests are busy right now. Please try again shortly.
ai.dailyRateLimited: Daily chat quota has been exhausted. Please try again tomorrow.
ai.upstreamRateLimited: External AI server is busy right now. Please try again shortly.

insight.error: AI insight is unavailable right now.

chat.pageSubtitle: Ask for summaries, spending patterns, savings ideas, or help recording a transaction in more natural language.
chat.emptyPrompt: Please write a question first, then I can help read your financial condition.
chat.shortcutHint: Press Enter for a new line, and use Ctrl+Enter or Cmd+Enter to send.
chat.helpDialogTitle: Tips for using the AI Assistant
chat.helpDialogDescription: Open this guide when you want to know which questions work best and what details are worth preparing before you start chatting.
chat.helpCapabilitiesPoint1: Ask for a recap of today, this week, or this month in lighter, easier language.
chat.helpCapabilitiesPoint2: Ask about spending patterns or the area that is putting the most pressure on your cash flow.
chat.helpCapabilitiesPoint3: Focus the analysis on one wallet when you do not want to read all wallets at once.
chat.helpCapabilitiesPoint4: Ask it to help record a new transaction as long as the type, amount, and context are clear enough.
chat.helpExample1: "Please summarize this week's spending and highlight the biggest one."
chat.helpExample2: "Which category is the heaviest in our family wallet this month?"
chat.helpExample3: "I want to record a Rp45,000 meal expense from last night in my personal wallet."
chat.helpExample4: "Based on this month's data, where is the most realistic place to start saving?"
chat.helpTip1: Mention the time period you mean, such as today, this week, or this month.
chat.helpTip2: Use the wallet filter or mention the wallet name when the context is specific to one wallet.
chat.helpTip3: For transaction recording, include the type, amount, category, and date when you know them.
chat.helpTip4: If the answer feels too general, follow up with a narrower or more concrete question.
chat.helpAccuracyNote: AI can help read patterns and prepare transaction recording, but you should still review every result before using it for financial decisions.
chat.emptyState: Start with the recap you need most.
chat.emptyDescription: This assistant can read wallet summaries, highlight major spending, explain your financial direction, and record a transaction once you're sure about the details.
chat.errorState: Sorry, the AI answer could not be loaded right now. Please try again shortly.
chat.unavailable: AI chat is currently unavailable. Please try again after the DeepSeek configuration is enabled.
chat.consentRequired: AI Chat cannot be used until you agree to send data to DeepSeek and enable the feature.
chat.prepareFailed: I couldn't prepare the AI answer right now. Please try again in a moment.
chat.streamFailed: A temporary issue happened while streaming the answer. Please try again in a moment.
chat.streamTimeout: AI ran out of time composing the full answer. Part of the answer may already be shown above.
chat.streamTruncated: AI answer was cut off due to time limit. Try asking again with a shorter question.
chat.validationTooLong: Questions are limited to 500 characters so the context stays focused and safe to process.
chat.validationUnsafe: This question looks like it is trying to bypass the assistant's safety boundaries. Please keep it focused on your finances.
chat.validationOffTopic: This assistant only helps with Balance financial analysis. Try asking about your transactions, budgets, balances, or savings.
chat.infoDescription: Your question is read together with the selected period recap, and AI can request extra detail or help record a transaction when needed.
chat.blockedTitle: AI Chat is paused until you give permission.
chat.blockedDescription: Before this feature can turn on, Balance needs explicit consent to send your question, relevant wallet context, and chat history to DeepSeek.
chat.blockedDisclosure: DeepSeek is a China-based AI provider. AI output may be inaccurate, so please review every answer before using it for financial decisions.
chat.consentDialogDescription: Balance needs your permission before sending AI Chat data to DeepSeek.
chat.consentDialogIntro: If you continue, Balance will enable AI Chat for this account and save the latest consent version.
chat.consentDialogPoint1: AI Chat questions, relevant wallet context, and conversation history will be sent to DeepSeek for processing.
chat.consentDialogPoint2: DeepSeek is a China-based AI provider, so AI Chat data is processed by that provider as part of this feature.
chat.consentDialogPoint3: AI output may be inaccurate and should be reviewed before it is used as a basis for financial decisions.
chat.consentDialogPoint4: You can disable AI Chat at any time from Settings. Existing chat history is not deleted automatically when the feature is turned off.
chat.consentDialogOutro: By pressing the agree button, you confirm that you understand this disclosure and allow Balance to enable AI Chat for your account.
chat.consentDialogPrivacyLink: See the full details in the Privacy Policy
chat.sidebarHeading: Use this assistant to read the story behind the numbers.
chat.sidebarSummary: Tap the question mark (?) button in the header to see example prompts, core capabilities, and tips for getting more accurate AI answers.
chat.sidebarFocusHint: Before asking, adjust the period and wallet filter when needed so the AI reads the same context you want to review.

prompts.day: Please summarize today's financial condition in simple language.
prompts.week: Create a recap for this week and highlight the most noticeable spending.
prompts.month: Give me this month's recap and the most important short insight.
prompts.record: I want to record a new transaction. Please help check the required details first.
prompts.save: Based on the current data, where is the most realistic area to save first?
prompts.analysis: Analyze my spending pattern and explain what needs the most attention.

chat.resetConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear all chat history? This cannot be undone.
chat.aiTransactionPreview: AI wants to record this transaction
chat.confidenceLow: AI is unsure, better record manually
chat.duplicateDetected: A similar transaction was found within the last 5 minutes
chat.dailyCapExceeded: Today's spending has exceeded the daily limit
chat.toolErrorConfidenceTooLow: AI is not confident enough about this transaction's details. Try recording it manually.
chat.toolErrorDuplicateDetected: A similar transaction was detected within the last 5 minutes. Please review it before recording again.
chat.toolErrorDailyCapExceeded: Today's spending would exceed the daily limit if this transaction is recorded. Review the amount or record it manually if needed.
chat.toolErrorValidationFailed: The transaction or budget details are still invalid. Please fix them and try again.
chat.toolErrorGeneric: There was a problem while processing the tool result. Please try again in a moment.

changelogs.title: Changelogs
changelogs.subtitle: What's new in Balance
changelogs.description: Track feature updates and improvements across versions.
changelogs.dialogDescription: Here's what changed since your last visit.
changelogs.emptyDescription: Feature updates will appear here as new versions are released.

auth.errorDefaultMessage: The authentication link could not be processed.
auth.accountActiveMessage: Account active. Create your first wallet.
auth.checkEmailMessage: Check your email to verify your account before logging in.
auth.googleError: Google sign-in could not be processed yet. Please try again.
auth.loginPanelTitle: Return to your calm, structured digital wallet.
auth.loginPanelSubtitle: Continue your household finance tracking with a lightweight interface, tidy numbers, and a rhythm that never feels overwhelming.
auth.loginDescription: Sign in again to continue your transactions, budgets, and wallet summaries.
auth.registerPanelTitle: Create a calm first impression from your very first money record.
auth.registerPanelSubtitle: Sign up to start managing a personal or shared wallet, record transactions more neatly, and build financial habits that feel lighter to maintain.
auth.registerTitle: Start with a personal wallet or a shared wallet.
auth.registerDescription: Create your account first, then continue with your first wallet to start recording, budgeting, and sharing access when needed.
auth.registerDetailDivider: or fill in your account details
auth.callbackMissingCode: Google authentication did not return a valid sign-in code.
auth.callbackExchangeFailed: Google sign-in could not be completed. Please try again.
auth.callbackSessionMissing: No Google session was found after sign-in. Please try again.
auth.confirmInvalidLink: The verification link is invalid or has expired.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage API keys for automated access
settings.headerDescription: Review your finances, tidy up records, and keep a calm money rhythm every day.
settings.aiChatDescription: Control whether Balance may send AI Chat questions, relevant wallet context, and conversation history to DeepSeek for processing.
settings.aiChatDisclosureSummary: Before AI Chat can be used, Balance asks for explicit consent because AI Chat data is sent to DeepSeek as a China-based AI provider.
settings.aiChatDisclosureDetail: You can disable AI Chat at any time. When disabled, the chat page remains accessible but no new data will be sent to DeepSeek until you enable it again.
settings.aiChatFootnote: Disabling this feature does not automatically delete chat history already stored in your account.
settings.aiChatEnabledSuccess: AI Chat was enabled and your consent was saved.
settings.aiChatDisabledSuccess: AI Chat was disabled. You can enable it again at any time.
settings.themeDescription: Choose the look that feels most comfortable. This preference is saved to your account and carried across devices when you sign in.
settings.themeLightDescription: Use Balance's signature warm cream interface.
settings.themeDarkDescription: Use a dark mode that still feels calm and comfortable.
settings.languageDescription: The active language follows the URL and is saved to your account so it stays consistent across devices.
settings.languageEnDescription: Use the full English interface across public and app pages.
settings.apiCreateDescription: API keys let Hermes or AI agents read finance summaries and write transactions without full credentials. Store the key safely. It is shown only once after creation.
settings.apiNewKeyDescription: Copy this key now. It will not be shown again after you leave this page.
settings.apiListDescription: Revoked keys can no longer be used. You can permanently delete a key from this list.
settings.apiEmpty: No API keys yet. Create your first key above.
settings.timezoneDescription: Set a manual timezone to record transactions in a different region. Default follows browser auto-detection.
settings.currencyDescription: Choose the default currency for new wallets. Each wallet can be changed to its own currency later.
settings.planDescription: What features you can access depends on your active plan.
settings.planBenefitApiAlways: API Key & AI integration: always free
settings.sharedWalletPremiumOnly: Shared wallet feature is only available for Premium users.
settings.planPaymentSuccess: Payment successful! Your Premium subscription will be active shortly.
settings.planPaymentPending: Payment is being processed. We will update your subscription status automatically.
settings.planPaymentSecure: Payments processed by Midtrans. Card data is securely encrypted.
settings.reminderDescription: Remind me to log daily income and expenses via push notifications.
settings.reminderPermissionDenied: Notification permission denied. Enable notification permission in your browser settings to use this feature.
settings.reminderUnsupported: Your browser does not support push notifications.

offline.title: No internet connection is currently available.
offline.description: Balance does not yet store wallet data for full offline use. As soon as the connection returns, you can sign in and view your data normally again.
offline.tipsDescription: Check your connection, switch networks, or reopen the app again in a moment.
offline.statusDescription: This PWA version focuses on installability and a tidy fallback, not offline data storage yet.
offline.cachedDataDescription: If you previously opened the dashboard, some summaries may still appear from the browser cache.

pwa.installDescription: Save Balance to your homescreen so opening your money notes feels quicker and tidier.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Your financial overview
dashboard.availableBalanceDetail: Balance across all wallets that is still ready to use outside savings.
dashboard.availableBudgetDetail: Total active budgets for the current month that remain.
dashboard.savingBalanceDetail: Accumulated savings set aside from all wallets.

dashboard.dailyExpenseChartHint: Scroll the chart to see every date.
dashboard.outstandingSplitDetail: Accumulated shared expenses that still need to be settled between members.
dashboard.activeWalletTitle: Control balances and budgets by wallet
dashboard.emptyWalletDescription: Create your first wallet from the Wallet page to start tracking transactions and inviting members.
dashboard.emptyCategoryDescription: Once you have expense transactions, the largest categories will appear here.
dashboard.emptyRecentDescription: Add income or expenses to start seeing the latest activity.
dashboard.onboardingActiveTitle: To make Balance feel useful quickly, start with these four steps first.
dashboard.onboardingCompletedTitle: Your first steps are already in place.
dashboard.onboardingActiveDescription: This checklist helps you set up your wallet, transactions, categories, budgets, and savings without guessing which feature to open first.
dashboard.onboardingCompletedDescription: Your wallet, first transaction, categories or budget, and savings are ready. Balance will return to the normal view shortly.
dashboard.onboardingActiveProgress: Finish the most important parts first. The rest can follow.

dashboard.onboardingStep2Description: Add your first income or expense so your balance, activity, and finance rhythm begin to take shape.
dashboard.onboardingStep3Description: Add a custom category or set a monthly budget so transactions are easier to read and planning actually feels alive.

transactions.adjustmentCategoryManaged: The balance adjustment category is managed automatically by the system based on whether the entry is income or expense.

transactions.historyEmptyTitle: No transactions in this month yet

transactions.createDialogDescription: Record income or spending for {walletName} without leaving this page.
transactions.savingLinkedNotice: This transaction was created automatically from the Savings tab and cannot be edited or deleted here.
transactions.balanceAdjustmentDescription: Use this when there is a gap between the real balance and the recorded balance in the app. This adjustment still appears in transaction history.
transactions.balanceAdjustmentAutoDirectionHint: Balance will automatically decide whether the wallet balance needs to go up or down based on the gap from the recorded balance.
transactions.balanceAdjustmentReasonPlaceholder: Example: physical wallet starting balance, cash correction, recording discrepancy
transactions.recentDescription: This card stays compact by design. Open full history when you need sorting, search, or deeper review.

wallets.presetDescription: The starter preset defines categories and transaction templates. The budget preset creates current-month limits that you can still edit later.

wallets.overviewSavingDetail: Total balance already separated into savings

categories.viewerNotice: Viewers can only see categories without creating, editing, or deleting them.

categories.deleteConfirm: Delete this category? Existing transactions stay safe, but their category will be cleared.

templates.activeTitle: Ready to use during transaction entry

landing.title:
Your money, clear.
Your mind, calm.
landing.description: Track spending, set budgets, and split bills — solo or with your partner. Everything tidy, nothing overwhelming.
landing.card1Description: The main view stays focused on what matters, so it does not feel mentally crowded.
landing.card2Description: Whether you use it alone or share spending with others, the flow still feels connected.
landing.card3Description: Reports and budgets help you see your money clearly without much guessing.
landing.summaryDescription: After essentials, shared bills, and savings targets, you can still clearly see where your money is moving.
landing.budgetDescription: Still safe for the remaining 12 days of this month.
landing.splitDescription: 2 settlements left to log so everything stays tidy.
landing.savingDescription: Savings still feel connected to your main wallet, so you never lose context.
landing.featuresTitle: Not just recording transactions, but helping decisions feel lighter.
landing.feature1Title: Cash-flow notes that are easy to read
landing.feature1Description: Income, expenses, and balances are easier to follow without opening many separate sheets.
landing.feature2Title: Monthly budgets that feel more tangible
landing.feature2Description: See which categories are still safe and which ones need to slow down before month-end.
landing.feature3Title: Split bills without long chat threads
landing.feature3Description: Share expenses, check remaining settlements, and move on without manual calculations.
landing.feature4Title: Savings that stay connected to your wallet
landing.feature4Description: Deposits and withdrawals still show up in the main money flow, so the full picture stays intact.
landing.stepsTitle: Getting started is fast, and the routine stays light too.
landing.stepsDescription: Balance is built so you can get going quickly, then slowly gain a clearer financial picture over time.
landing.step1Description: Use it for yourself, or create a shared wallet with your partner, family, or housemates.
landing.step2Description: Income, expenses, split bills, and savings can all be logged quickly without a tiring flow.
landing.step3Description: Check budgets, balances, and monthly reports to make decisions with less guesswork.
landing.useCase1Description: Great if you want to know where your money goes, keep budgets sensible, and build a tidier financial rhythm.
landing.useCase2Description: Works well for household needs, shared rentals, or small projects that need transparent money tracking.
landing.pricingDescription: Start free, upgrade anytime for more features.
landing.ctaTitle: If you want a calmer relationship with money, start here first.
landing.ctaDescription: Open an account, create your first wallet, and start recording only what you need. It does not have to be perfect immediately as long as your money becomes clearer day by day.
landing.faq1Answer: Yes, your data is safe. We use Supabase for authentication and database with Row-Level Security (RLS) access controls. Only you and the wallet members you invite can see your financial data. We do not sell your data to any third parties.
landing.faq2Question: Can I use it with my partner?
landing.faq2Answer: Yes. You can create a shared wallet and invite your partner, family, or housemates as members. Each member can have a different role — editor to record transactions, or viewer to see only.
landing.faq3Answer: Balance has a Free plan that you can use indefinitely at no cost. There is also a Premium plan at Rp29,000/month (or Rp250,000/year) that unlocks additional features like unlimited AI Chat, 12-month reports, and PDF export. All core features remain free.
landing.faq4Answer: Balance focuses on one thing: making household finances feel calm. No ads, no confusing investment features, no gamification — just clean records, budgets, and reports. Plus, AI Chat helps you understand your finances in plain language, not confusing tables.
landing.previewTitle: This is what Balance looks like inside
landing.previewDescription: A compact dashboard, easy transaction logging, and AI that helps you understand your finances in plain language.
landing.testimonial1Quote: Finally, an app that doesn't add to the stress. My wife and I can now track our spending together without arguing about numbers.
landing.testimonial2Quote: The AI Chat genuinely helps. I just say 'log 150k groceries' and it's recorded. No more digging through categories.
landing.testimonial3Quote: What I love most: it's simple. No weird charts, no promo notifications. Just clean money tracking that keeps me calm.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Balance values your privacy. This policy explains what data we collect, how it is used, where it is stored, and the choices you have when using this app.

dataWeCollect.heading: Data We Collect
dataWeCollect.body: We collect your name and email through Supabase Auth, along with the financial data you enter into the app such as wallets, transactions, budgets, savings, and your theme and language preferences. When using the AI Chat feature, we also collect the questions you submit, relevant wallet context, and conversation history to process answers.

howWeUse.heading: How We Use Data
howWeUse.body: We use your data to authenticate your account, operate app features, display your financial records, support shared wallets when you use them, and save preferences such as theme and language. AI chat data is used to generate answers to your questions and is not used to train AI models outside of Balance's context.

dataStorage.heading: Data Storage
dataStorage.body: Your data is stored in Supabase as the cloud service for authentication and the app database. We use app access controls and database policies (Row-Level Security) to limit access to data according to feature needs and wallet member roles.

thirdParty.heading: Third-Party Services
thirdParty.body: Balance uses Supabase for authentication, database, and session storage. For the AI Chat feature, we use DeepSeek as the language model (LLM) provider, which is based in China. When AI Chat is enabled, your questions, relevant financial context, and the conversation history required for the feature are sent to DeepSeek for processing. We do not currently use third-party analytics or tracking services to monitor your usage behavior.

cookies.heading: Cookies
cookies.body: This app uses Supabase cookies to keep your sign-in session active and the balance-locale cookie to remember your language preference. We do not use third-party analytics or advertising cookies.

aiProcessing.heading: AI Processing
aiProcessing.body: The AI Assistant feature processes your questions together with relevant financial data to generate answers. If you enable AI Chat, your questions, relevant wallet context, and the required chat history are sent to DeepSeek as a China-based AI provider for processing. AI output can be inaccurate and should be reviewed before it is used as a basis for financial decisions. Chat history is stored in your account to maintain conversation context, can be deleted through the reset chat history feature, and AI Chat itself can be turned off at any time from Settings.

sharedWallets.heading: Shared Wallets
sharedWallets.body: If you create or join a shared wallet, the financial data in that wallet can be seen by other members according to their role (owner, editor, or viewer). Each member is responsible for the data they enter. The wallet owner can manage membership and remove members at any time.

pwa.heading: PWA Access
pwa.body: Balance can be installed as a Progressive Web App (PWA) on mobile devices for quick access from the home screen. The PWA stores some local cache data to speed up loading, but Balance does not currently work fully offline — an internet connection is still required to access and save your financial data.

userRights.heading: Your Rights
userRights.body: You can request access to the data stored about your account, update your profile data at any time through the settings page, or request deletion of your data and account. For sign-in, we only send the magic-link email required for authentication. AI chat data can be deleted through the reset chat history feature available on the AI Assistant page.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.body: If you have questions about this privacy policy, want to access your data, or request deletion of your data and account, please contact us through the support email that will be added to this page.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By using Balance, you agree to the following terms of service. Please read them carefully before using this application.

acceptance.heading: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.body: By creating an account or using Balance, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these terms of service. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, please do not use Balance.

eligibility.heading: Eligibility
eligibility.body: You must be at least 17 years old or have parental/guardian consent to use Balance. By registering, you warrant that the information you provide is true and accurate.

accountResponsibility.heading: Account Responsibility
accountResponsibility.body: You are fully responsible for the security of your account, including keeping your password confidential and not sharing your login credentials with others. Balance is not liable for any loss arising from unauthorized access to your account.

acceptableUse.heading: Acceptable Use
acceptableUse.body: Balance is a household financial tracking and management tool. You agree to use this application in compliance with applicable laws and not to misuse it for illegal activities, fraud, or money laundering.

sharedWalletCollaboration.heading: Shared Wallet Collaboration
sharedWalletCollaboration.body: Shared wallets allow multiple members to access and manage the same financial data. You are responsible for the actions of the members you invite. The wallet owner has the right to manage membership and remove members. Balance is not responsible for disputes between wallet members.

aiAssistantDisclaimer.heading: AI Assistant and Limitations
aiAssistantDisclaimer.body: Balance's AI Assistant is an artificial intelligence feature designed to help read and analyze your financial data. AI-generated results are for informational purposes only and may contain inaccuracies. Balance is not a provider of financial, accounting, legal, or investment advice. All financial decisions remain solely your responsibility.

pricingAndPlans.heading: Pricing and Plans
pricingAndPlans.body: Balance offers Free and Premium plans. The Free plan can be used at no cost with limited features. The Premium plan is paid and provides access to additional features such as unlimited AI Chat, 12-month reports, and PDF export. Pricing, features, and plan terms are subject to change at any time with prior notice. Premium assignment and payment mechanics are still evolving.

availability.heading: Availability and Warranty
availability.body: Balance is provided on an 'as-is' basis without warranty that the service will be uninterrupted, error-free, or secure from technical disruptions. We make no express or implied warranties regarding the fitness, accuracy, or reliability of the application for any purpose. To the extent permitted by law, Balance is not liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use or inability to use this application.

changes.heading: Changes to Terms
changes.body: We may update these terms of service at any time. Changes will be announced through the application or website. By continuing to use Balance after changes take effect, you agree to the updated terms.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.body: If you have questions, suggestions, or complaints regarding these terms of service, please contact us through the support email that will be added to this page.

refundPolicy.title: Refund Policy
refundPolicy.intro: This policy explains how Balance handles refund requests for digital payments related to services such as Premium access purchased through Balance. As a general rule, all payments are final and non-refundable, except for the limited cases described below.

scope.heading: Policy Scope
scope.body: This Refund Policy applies to digital payments made for Balance services, including but not limited to Premium access or similar digital services purchased through Balance. This policy does not expand any refund rights beyond what is expressly stated on this page.

generalPolicy.heading: General Policy
generalPolicy.body: All payments made to Balance are generally final and non-refundable. Once a payment has been successfully processed, you are considered to have accepted the price, features, and service scope available at the time of the transaction.

exceptions.heading: Limited Exceptions
exceptions.body: Balance may only consider a refund in the following limited situations: a duplicate charge for the same transaction, a successful payment where the digital service or access was not delivered due to a technical issue on Balance's side, or a refund that is required by applicable law.

nonRefundableSituations.heading: Non-Refundable Situations
nonRefundableSituations.body: Refund requests based on a change of mind, no longer needing the service, or personal expectations that do not match your usage preference are generally not eligible. Balance may reject requests that do not fall within the limited exceptions stated in this policy.

requestProcess.heading: How to Request a Refund
requestProcess.body: All refund requests must be submitted by email to support@mybalance.my.id. Requests should be sent as soon as possible after you discover the issue so we can review the transaction and service status more accurately.

requiredInformation.heading: Required Information
requiredInformation.body: When requesting a refund, you must include at minimum your Balance account email, transaction or order details, payment date, amount paid, and a short explanation of the issue. Balance may request additional information when needed for verification.

reviewAndApproval.heading: Review and Approval
reviewAndApproval.body: Each refund request will be reviewed manually based on transaction data, service status, and available supporting evidence. A refund request is not automatically approved, and the final decision remains with Balance to the extent permitted by applicable law.

processingTime.heading: Refund Processing Time
processingTime.body: If a refund is approved, the time required for the funds to be returned may vary depending on the payment method used and the processing flow of the payment provider, including Midtrans and the related payment channel partners. Balance will process approved refunds as soon as reasonably possible, but the time for the funds to appear back in the customer's account is not fully under Balance's control.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.body: For questions about this policy or to submit a refund request, please contact support@mybalance.my.id.

reports.exportPdfError: The PDF could not be generated right now. Please try again shortly.
reports.emptyDescription: Once transactions are recorded, monthly income and expense trends will appear here.
reports.historyLockedDescription: The Free plan shows the last 3 months. Upgrade to Premium for 12 months.

members.inviteDescription: Create a token-based invitation link, then share it with the people you want to add to this wallet.
members.capacitySummary: {memberCount} active members + {pendingCount} pending invitations. The owner also counts toward this limit.
members.walletFullNotice: This wallet is full. Resolve or cancel pending invitations before adding new members.
members.ownerOnlyNotice: Only the wallet owner can invite new members.
members.createDialogDescription: Choose an access role and create a token-based invitation link. Share the link with the person you want to add — they will join as soon as they accept it.
members.emptyInvitations: There are no invitations waiting for a response yet.

actionStatus.linkedSavingTransaction: This transaction was created automatically from savings. Edit the entry from the Savings tab.

actionErrors.profileNotSynced: Profile is not synced yet. Run migration 0002 or provide SUPABASE_SECRET_KEY.
actionErrors.inviteOwnerOnly: Only the wallet owner can invite members.
actionErrors.inviteSecretMissing: SUPABASE_SECRET_KEY must be configured before invitations can be accepted.
actionErrors.inviteAlreadyAccepted: This invitation has already been accepted.
actionErrors.inviteRevoked: This invitation has been revoked by the wallet owner.
actionErrors.inviteCapacityReached: This wallet has reached the maximum of {maxMembers} people.
actionErrors.inviteAcceptanceFull: This wallet is full, so the invitation cannot be accepted yet.
actionErrors.categoryNameDuplicate: A category with the same name already exists for this type.
actionErrors.budgetWriteForbidden: You don't have permission to change budgets in this wallet.
actionErrors.budgetCategoryNotFound: Budget category not found in this wallet.
actionErrors.savingEntryDateInvalid: Savings entry date must be valid.
actionErrors.savingEntryAmountInvalid: Savings entry amount must be greater than zero.
actionErrors.sharedSavingMemberRequired: Choose a contributing member before depositing into a shared saving.
actionErrors.walletAvailableBalanceInsufficient: The wallet's available balance is not enough for this savings deposit.
actionErrors.savingBalanceInsufficient: The saving balance is not enough for this withdrawal.
actionErrors.savingMemberNotInWallet: The contributing member does not belong to this wallet.
actionErrors.savingBalanceManagedByEntries: Saving balances can only change through deposit or withdrawal entries.
actionErrors.savingEntryForbidden: You do not have permission to add savings entries in this wallet.
actionErrors.authRequired: Login session not found. Please sign in again.
actionErrors.transactionDateInvalid: Transaction date must be provided in a valid format.
actionErrors.transactionAmountInvalid: Transaction amount must be greater than zero.
actionErrors.transactionWriteForbidden: You do not have permission to record transactions in this wallet.
actionErrors.transactionCategoryNotFound: The transaction category was not found in this wallet.
actionErrors.transactionCategoryKindMismatch: The transaction category does not match the selected transaction type.
actionErrors.freeTierTransactionLimitReached: Free accounts are limited to {maxTransactions} transactions per month. Upgrade your plan or wait for next month's reset.
actionErrors.transactionRateLimited: Too many transaction attempts in a short time. Please try again shortly.
actionErrors.balanceAdjustmentCategoryUnavailable: The balance adjustment category could not be prepared.
actionErrors.balanceAdjustmentDateInvalid: Balance adjustment date must be provided in a valid format.
actionErrors.balanceAdjustmentAmountInvalid: The actual balance must be provided as a valid amount.
actionErrors.balanceAdjustmentNoChange: The actual balance matches the recorded balance, so no adjustment needs to be created.
actionErrors.balanceAdjustmentReasonRequired: A balance adjustment reason is required.
actionErrors.recurringStartDateInvalid: Recurring start date must be provided in a valid format.
actionErrors.recurringEndDateInvalid: Recurring end date must be valid.
actionErrors.recurringEndBeforeStart: End date cannot be before the start date.
actionErrors.recurringAmountInvalid: Recurring amount must be greater than zero.
actionErrors.recurringIntervalInvalid: Recurring interval must be at least 1.
actionErrors.recurringAlreadyEnded: This recurring transaction has already ended and cannot be resumed.
actionErrors.duplicateEntry: Data already exists. Cannot create a duplicate.
actionErrors.referenceNotFound: Related data not found. Please check your selection.
actionErrors.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
actionErrors.transactionConfidenceTooLow: AI is unsure. Try recording manually.
actionErrors.transactionDuplicateDetected: This transaction is similar to an existing one.
actionErrors.loginRateLimited: Too many login attempts. Please try again later.

actionSuccess.walletInvitationCreated: Invitation link for role {role} was created successfully.

inviteShare.copyFailed: Failed to copy the link. Open the link and copy it manually instead.
inviteShare.shareUnavailable: Share is not available on this device. Use the copy link button instead.
inviteShare.shareReady: Invitation link is ready to share.
inviteShare.shareFailed: Failed to open the share menu. Use the copy link button instead.

debts.viewerNotice: Viewers can only view without adding or editing.
debts.emptyDescription: Record a new debt or loan to start tracking.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.
